ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., implantable, portable) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the device */,
  "device_category" TEXT /* Category of the device (e.g., cardiac, diabetes) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the device was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiration date */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for regular maintenance */,
  "battery_life" TEXT /* Information about the device's battery life */,
  "data_transmission_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for data transmission */,
  "data_storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage requirements for the device data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_patients" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "binding_date" TEXT /* Date the device was bound to the patient */,
  "unbinding_date" TEXT /* Date the device was unbound from the patient */,
  "reason_for_binding" TEXT /* Reason for binding the device to the patient */,
  "reason_for_unbinding" TEXT /* Reason for unbinding the device from the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id", "patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that sent the transmission */,
  "transmission_date" TEXT /* Date the transmission was sent */,
  "data" TEXT /* Actual data transmitted */,
  "transmission_status" TEXT /* Status of the transmission */,
  "retry_count" INTEGER /* Number of retry attempts */,
  "transmission_metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the transmission */,
  "transmission_protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the transmission protocol used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_transmissions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_info_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "info_type" TEXT /* Type of information (e.g., user manual, technical specifications) */,
  "info_value" TEXT /* Actual information value */,
  "info_format" TEXT /* Format of the information */,
  "info_size" TEXT /* Size of the information file */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_info_details_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_software" (
  "software_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version number of the software */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the software was released */,
  "software_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the software version */,
  "software_change_log" TEXT /* Change log for the software version */,
  "software_compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility with other devices or systems */,
  "installation_instructions" TEXT /* Instructions for installing the software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("software_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_software_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., healthcare professional, administrator, patient) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "maintenance_performed_by" TEXT /* Person or team who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
